summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected. The remaining useful focused PRs remain open; maintainer or author follow-up is needed only for proof, review, or technical correctness gates on the affected non-security PRs. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR-creation action is planned by this job.
